nasb.text: Then all the people arose as one man, saying, “Not one of us will go to his tent, nor will any of us return to his house.

esv.text: And all the people arose as one man, saying, “None of us will go to his tent, and none of us will return to his house.

cnv.text: 於是眾人都起來如同一人，說：“我們當中誰都不回自己的帳棚，誰都不回自己的家。

ccb.text: 众人起来异口同声地说：“我们谁也不回帐篷，谁也不回家。
